title: FetchTicketOutput
description: The OUTPUT contract of the `fetch_ticket` scripted step (workflow authoring v2, walking skeleton). Declared via `@register_step(output_schema=...)`, surfaced read-only in the editor inspector as the step's PRODUCES, and consumed by the linter: a `${{ steps.<id>.outputs.<name> }}` reference to this step is checked NAME-EXISTENCE against these properties.

ticket.description: The compiled ticket state (the full TicketState object).

ticket_id.description: The id of the fetched ticket.
